parameters-en.Grit: Determines how old and distorted the megaphone sounds.
parameters-en.Tone: Controls the overall tonal balance of the effect.
parameters-en.Focus: Adds more resonance to the effected signal.
parameters-en.Space: Adds a bit of echo to the effected signal.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the effected and the dry signal. At 0%, no effect is heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
